hero.badge: Trusted by Operators Across North America
hero.body: From warehouses in Vancouver to logistics hubs across the U.S. — we deliver premium forklifts, material handling systems, and genuine parts with the service standards your operation demands.

equipmentGrid.heading: Equipment Built for Every
equipmentGrid.body: Explore our full inventory of new, used, and certified pre-owned machinery — sourced from the world's most trusted manufacturers.

trust.heading: Engineering Reliability Into Every
trust.body: For over three decades, WanShing Machinery has connected quality equipment with demanding operations — from distribution centers in Vancouver and Edmonton to warehouses across the United States. As an authorized Zoomlion dealer and manufacturer partner, we don't just sell machinery. We build partnerships anchored in transparent pricing, rigorous quality inspections, and Canada-wide delivery that works.

certified.title: Certified & Safety-Tested
certified.body: Every unit is fully inspected, serviced, and safety-checked before delivery. No exceptions.

delivery.title: Canada-Wide Delivery
delivery.body: Fast delivery from our Vancouver and Edmonton warehouses to all major Canadian cities and the US.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.body: No hidden fees. Straightforward quotes on all sales, rentals, and new Zoomlion equipment.

support.title: Bilingual Support Team
support.body: English and Mandarin speaking technicians. Ongoing parts, repairs, and technical support.

services.heading: Beyond the Sale: We Keep You

maintenance.title: Service & Maintenance
maintenance.body: Scheduled service programs backed by certified mechanics. Forklift repair, preventive maintenance, and safety inspections that minimize downtime.

parts.title: Parts & Components
parts.body: Forklift forks, extensions, LPG tanks, batteries, and replacement parts for all major makes and models. In-stock and ready to ship.

financing.title: Flexible Financing
financing.body: Leasing, financing plans, and rental options that fit your budget. Whether buying new or leasing used, we make equipment accessible for every operation.

quote.heading: Ready to Equip Your Operation?
quote.body: Tell us what you need — our team will deliver a detailed proposal with pricing, availability, and delivery timeline within 24 hours.
quote.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more — model, quantity, timeline, budget...

footer.tagline: Premier forklifts and material handling equipment. Authorized Zoomlion dealer serving Canada & the United States.

catalog.heading: Equipment Catalog
catalog.body: New, used, and certified pre-owned forklifts, reach trucks, pallet jacks, scissor lifts, and more — sourced from the world's most trusted manufacturers.
catalog.itemsFound: {count, plural, =1 {1 item found} other {# items found}}
catalog.noEquipmentBody: Try adjusting your filters, or browse the full catalog.

detail.requestQuote: Request a Quote for This Unit

notFound.heading: Page Not Found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for has moved or doesn't exist. Let's get you back on track.
